name: @opentf/workeros-programs
description: WorkerOS OS programs: the installable /bin programs (npm, …) plus the Node-compatible guest runtime (process shim + CommonJS require).

scripts.build:codec: cargo build -p workeros-codec --release --target wasm32-unknown-unknown && mkdir -p src/codec && cp ../../target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release/workeros_codec.wasm src/codec/codec.wasm
scripts.build:bundler: cargo build -p workeros-node-bundler --release --target wasm32-unknown-unknown && mkdir -p src/node-bundler && cp ../../target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release/workeros_node_bundler.wasm src/node-bundler/bundler.wasm
scripts.build:grep: cargo build --manifest-path ../../crates/wsh-grep/Cargo.toml --release --target wasm32-wasip1 && mkdir -p src/grep && cp ../../crates/wsh-grep/target/wasm32-wasip1/release/grep.wasm src/grep/grep.wasm
scripts.build:wasm: npm run build:codec && npm run build:bundler && npm run build:grep
scripts.build: npm run build:wasm && npm run build:programs
